title: Overworld Netherite
description: Get an access to ancient debris and smithing upgrades without going to the Nether through "realistic" and grindy crafting recipes
body:
This datapack adds a way to get some netherite with upgrades **without The Nether**, so it will be useful if The Nether is disabled or you just have a challenge. Though I should warn you, as the recipes are quite *grindy*, yet can make some sense.

Here are the recipes that come with the datapack:

![All the recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Dak4sAgT/images/432143c83dabb3af70537d8ea85efea4184dfdc6.png)
*Ancient debris recipe contains 4 blocks of coal and 1 obsidian

⚠ Make sure you craft the items by the image first, so it can appear in recipe book.
